name: Avengers RPG {Isekai Version}
description:
In an awful, yet very cliche turn of events, you have been hit by a truck and you find yourself waking up within the MCU. Made to be used in first person! Current Characters included:

Tony Stark

Steve Rogers

Bucky Barnes

Natasha Romanoff

Clint Barton

Bruce Banner

Thor Odinson

Loki Laufeyson

I cannot guarantee that characters who are not mentioned above will be able to remain in character

Please be aware that the bit speaking for you is an LLM issue. To get rid of it, edit it out of messages or rate the response one star. The bot should adapt and stop.

Updated as of 02/24/2025

  • Updated example dialogue

  • Adjusted initial message back to be more open ended and allow the user to choose how their story starts.

  • Added in the definition of an Isekai within the Personality and working on small tweaks to ensure the bot works as intended.

  • Added Thor and Loki! :D

-IF YOU REVIEW THIS BOT, PLEASE TELL ME WHY YOU LIKE, OR DISLIKE IT, THAT WAY I CAN UPDATE AND TWEAK IT ACCORDINGLY TO GIVE YOU ALL THE BEST EXPERIENCE :)-

This bot includes Tony, Bruce, Natasha, Clint, Steve, and Bucky!

If you want a different cast or scenario, please look down at other bots I have made!

Avengers RPG - Same cast, different scenario! You play as someone who already lives within the Marvel Universe!

Avengers RPG (GotG ver.) - Focused on the Guardians of the Galaxy! Characters included: Peter Quill, Gamora, Groot, Rocket, Drax, and Mantis!
creator: Syn
